lineup_source: Iraq vs Norway, Group I opener, June 2026 (projected starting XI based on 26-man World Cup squad)

players.name: Jalal Hassan
players.note: Born in Baghdad; captain, no foreign parental origin documented.

players.name: Rebin Sulaka
players.note: Born in Erbil (Ankawa) to an Assyrian Christian family; moved to Sweden at age 10, but both parents are Iraqi.

players.name: Zaid Tahseen
players.note: Born in Najaf; no foreign parental origin documented.

players.name: Merchas Doski
players.note: Born in Hanover, Germany, to Iraqi Kurdish parents from Iraq.

players.name: Frans Putros
players.note: Born in Aarhus, Denmark, to Assyrian Iraqi parents.

players.name: Aimar Sher
players.note: Born in Kirkuk to Assyro-Chaldean parents; family moved to Sweden when he was four.

players.name: Amir Al-Ammari
players.note: Born in Jönköping, Sweden, to an Iraqi father and a Palestinian mother who met in Kuwait before settling in Sweden.

players.name: Kevin Yakob
players.note: Born in Gothenburg, Sweden, to Assyrian parents from Basra, Iraq.

players.name: Zidane Iqbal
players.note: Born in Manchester; father grew up in Lahore, Pakistan, mother is from Samawah, Iraq, who left during the first Gulf War.

players.name: Ali Al-Hamadi
players.note: Born in Maysan, Iraq; family fled to Liverpool, England, when he was one, but both parents are Iraqi.

players.name: Aymen Hussein
players.note: Born in the village of Al-Safra to a family of sheep farmers; father was a soldier killed by Al-Qaeda.
